The '''Lord Being of the [[Swirblies]]''' was a deity of the [[Skakoan religion]].

==Biography==
It lived in the [[Gates of Grontessiant]]. It oversaw the [[Four See Seers of the Cyclops|See Seers]] and guarded the [[Albino Cyclops]] and its [[Eye of the Albino Cyclops|Eye]].

{{Deity-stub}}

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Wat Tambor and the Quest for the Sacred Eye of the Albino Cyclops|book=Star Wars: Visionaries}} {{1st}}
